notes: 5 gold videos analyzed. New: warm_ambient grade + social_dynamics archetype from @unc_iiris 332.8K. Highest performer in library.

dark_cinema.description: Near-black bg, warm isolated skin tones. Top performer: @roge.editz 285.9K

desaturated_bw.description: Near-monochrome. Top performer: @black.pill.city podcast clips, high save rate

warm_ambient.description: Party/venue lighting — warm skin under purple/pink ambient. #1 performer: @unc_iiris 332.8K. IRL social clips.

teal_orange.description: High contrast warm/cool split. Use for transformation reveals.

natural.description: Minimal grade. Street interview / reaction format. @bp.pilled 102.8K

none.description: No text overlay. Dominant pattern across ALL top performers (4/5 videos). Default for mog_edit, social_dynamics, podcast_clip, street_interview.

music.note: Original sounds also valid — @unc_iiris used custom original sound on 332.8K video. Don't over-index on trending audio.

descriptions.mog_edit: Cinematic edit showcasing physical dominance. Dark grade, face closeups, no text. @roge.editz 285.9K
descriptions.social_dynamics: IRL footage showing real-world male status/behavior patterns. Warm ambient lighting, party/social settings, zero text. @unc_iiris 332.8K — CURRENT TOP PERFORMER
descriptions.jester_contrast: Sub-type of social_dynamics. Shows attractive guy in jester/low-status behavior. Caption is single ironic label + ellipsis ('jestermaxxer...'). Creates debate = algorithm fuel.
descriptions.provocation: Street interview / debate bait. Short provocative claim drives comments. @bp.pilled 102.8K
descriptions.meme_edit: Ironic quote format ('just lower cortisol bro'). Saveable/shareable. @morphedmanlet 288.5K

caption_strategy.ellipsis_technique: Trailing '...' after single concept ('jestermaxxer...') creates ambiguity and invites interpretation — confirmed high save/share driver

cta.text: Discipline = results. Drop your glow-up progress below.
cta.note: CTA optional for mog_edit format — may reduce authenticity

universal_rules: Zero text overlays = default. 4/5 top performers have no text.
Caption: 1-3 words MAX before hashtags. Irony or ambiguity > description.
Dark or warm-ambient grades outperform bright grades consistently.
Original sounds viable — don't force trending audio.
Save rate >10% = reference/meme content = algorithm multiplier.
